title: WOS Studio (Authoring) — Identity Subject
description: IdentitySubject seam composing parent PLN-0381 (identity attestation P0 commitment, 2026-04-27). Per studio-authoring/specs/identity-and-attestation.md, this is a placeholder until PLN-0381 ratifies; today it carries SubjectClaim + AttestationEnvelope shapes that the workspace consumes for identity-bearing operations (signatures, approvals, attestations). When PLN-0381 lands, this schema becomes a thin wrapper composing the parent identity types via $ref.
$comment: Promotion status (Stage-3, 2026-05-01): seam contract only; the deeper identity primitives (signed claim envelope, key rotation, revocation) are owned by parent PLN-0381 and will be referenced when ratified.

x-lm.intent: Document type marker for the Studio IdentitySubject object

id.description: Stable subject identifier. Composes parent PLN-0381 subject identity when ratified; today an opaque workspace-scoped identifier.

workspaceId.description: Workspace this subject is registered in. (Subjects MAY be cross-workspace via federation; today they are workspace-scoped.)

claims.description: Subject claims (role, employer, jurisdiction-of-license, etc.). Each claim carries kind + value + attestationRef proving the claim. Composes parent PLN-0381 SubjectClaim envelope when ratified.

attestationRef.description: Reference to the attestation envelope that proves the claim. PLN-0381-shaped when ratified.

publicKeyRef.description: Reference to the subject's signing public key. Today opaque (e.g., `did:web:dhs.state.tx.us#sarah-chen-key-2026-04`); composes parent PLN-0381 key registry when ratified.

validFrom.description: When the subject's signing authority starts. ISO-8601 date or datetime.

validUntil.description: When the subject's signing authority ends (null = open-ended).

revoked.description: True if this subject's signing authority has been revoked (key rotation or removal).
